name: American Airlines (National Airline Partner)
whatItProvides: American Airlines serves as the National Airline Partner for TAPS, donating flights to transport grieving military families to TAPS seminars and Good Grief Camps.

name: Military Times (National Media Partner)
whatItProvides: Military Times serves as the official National Media Partner for TAPS, helping share survivor stories, publicize support hotlines, and advocate for legislative benefits.

name: TAPS Presenting Sponsors ($500k+ level)
whatItProvides: Major corporations donating over $500,000 annually to support specific survivor programs and regional support hubs.

name: TAPS Legacy Sponsors ($250k+ level)
whatItProvides: Foundations and corporations providing over $250,000 to fund peer mentoring networks and casework assistance.

name: TAPS Valor Sponsors ($100k+ level)
whatItProvides: Corporations donating over $100,000 to assist with grief seminars, youth camps, and online communities.

name: TAPS Patriot Sponsors ($50k+ level)
whatItProvides: Sponsors providing over $50,000 in support of TAPS events, regional seminars, and community projects.

name: Corporate Event Sponsorship
whatItProvides: Enables companies and organizations to sponsor individual youth camps, men/women retreats, or regional golf tournaments.

name: Annual TAPS Honor Gala Support
whatItProvides: Sponsorship paths for the annual TAPS Honor Gala, which raises funds to ensure all TAPS programs remain free for military survivors.
